subject: Re: Fwd: Update
body:
exit


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, April 27, 2007 11:03:48 AM
Subject: Fwd: Update


Jamie Casner is asking for advice on how to proceed with Red Hook Marina now that IGY has passed on the deal.  
 
FYI -- the e-mail from me that is included in Jamie's e-mail was sent last week.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone: 212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 646-468-3155 
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com







See what's free at AOL.com. 
Darren - Due to Carnival I cannot get to my office.  I received a message that IGY is passing on the Dohm deal.  Where do you and Mr. Epstein wish to go from here?  Plese advise asap.  If he is going to do the deal, I have a lot of scrambling to do.....If not, we need an exit strategy.  Call me at home 340-777-6212.  Thanks.  ajc

DKIESQ@aol.com wrote: 
Jamie,
 
Not sure if you are still on holiday.  If not, could you please tell me where we stand regarding Red Hook?  THanks.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
